programme.title: Pink Panther And Sons

programme.desc: Master Graystrips realizes that Murfel is his exact double and persuades him to trade places for a day.

programme.title: Pink Panther And Sons
programme.desc: Pinky and Chatta go to a horror movie, leaving Finko as Panky's Panther-sitter!

programme.title: Pink Panther And Sons
programme.desc: While the Panthers are on a tropical cruise, Panky finds a dinosaur egg.

programme.title: Pink Panther And Sons
programme.desc: Finko and Chatta each want to win tickets to the Grey Cats Concert, but it is Chatta who wins!

programme.title: PIEL SALVAJE
programme.desc: Camila busca a su madre biológica tras haber sido abandonada en la calle años atrás. En el proceso se encuentra en medio de dos empresas de moda enemistadas que quieren destruirse mutuamente por todos los medios, incluidos el secuestro y el asesinato.

programme.title: PIEL SALVAJE
programme.desc: Camila busca a su madre biológica tras haber sido abandonada en la calle años atrás. En el proceso se encuentra en medio de dos empresas de moda enemistadas que quieren destruirse mutuamente por todos los medios, incluidos el secuestro y el asesinato.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa es una joven dominada por la codicia. Sus padres han hecho grandes sacrificios para darle una vida buena y decente, pero Teresa quiere más, mucho más.

programme.title: Azucar
programme.desc: Una maldición sobre la familia de Manuel María Solaz se confirmará durante las próximas tres generaciones. Una novela que te hará viajar a otros tiempos, con pasiones, amores prohibidos, intriga y venganza en el universo de la caña de azúcar.

programme.title: Azucar
programme.desc: Una maldición sobre la familia de Manuel María Solaz se confirmará durante las próximas tres generaciones. Una novela que te hará viajar a otros tiempos, con pasiones, amores prohibidos, intriga y venganza en el universo de la caña de azúcar.

programme.title: LA TREPADORA
programme.desc: La Trepadora narra el choque entre dos familias poderosas y orgullosas. Nicolás Del Casal, decidido a recuperar el honor que le arrebataron a su madre, regresa a las tierras de sus antepasados. Allí se enfrenta a secretos, traiciones y al dominio de los Peñalver, la familia rival.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Carlin says he can predict earthquakes, but Dokko doesn't believe him until one happens! Even then Dokko sets out to prove that it was only a coincidence, and that earthquakes cannot be predicted. In this episode, kids learn about the causes of earthquakes, volcanoes, and wind storms.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Pin misses his Bi-Bi and wants to find a way to see and communicate with him across great distances. He decides he wants a moving picture so he can see Bi-Bi in action! In this episode, kids learn about movies and video and how they are processed and made. Featuring scientist Vladimir Kozmich Zvorikin.

programme.title: The Fixies

programme.desc: What could be better than a meadow of flowers on a beautiful day? Rookie is enjoying the sun and the beautiful blue sky, watching the clouds pass by - but wait! What‘s that? One of the clouds turns, and suddenly its shape reminds him of one of his friends! And who is that again? What a fun game to play! Rookie continues to search for clouds that remind him of his friends and their adventures together.

programme.title: Construction Squad

programme.title: Rookie Robot
programme.sub-title: BUILDING BLOCKS, FALLING TOWERS – ROOKIE AND THE MOLE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Invent'Tom
programme.desc: Meet Tom, Car City’s very own inventor! In his high-tech lab, he creates the wackiest inventions to solve his friend’s problems.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: It's "Be good to the Earth" week, but Krashy has a new car that creates a lot of pollution! Krashy loves his new car, but it's up to his friends to make it more environmentally friendly. In this episode, kids learn about sustainability and how they can help protect the earth.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.sub-title: They Can Get by Without Us
programme.desc: Barry is leading the team to find a new species! When they find out they're looking for new plants, the team isn't very excited at first. Can Barry get them on board by showing them how exciting plants can be? In this episode, kids learn about different species of plants, and how they grow.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!
